description_long: This is a modern bed with a simple, streamlined design, featuring a thick, plush comforter that drapes over the sides and foot of the bed. The bedding appears to be a single, solid color, giving the bed a clean and minimalist look. The head of the bed is slightly elevated, suggesting the presence of a subtle headboard integrated beneath the bedding. The mattress is thick and well-cushioned, with the bedding tightly fitted and smooth across the surface. There are no visible legs or frame details, as the bedding extends nearly to the ground on all sides. The overall appearance is soft and inviting, suitable for a contemporary urban bedroom or residential setting.
description: A modern bed with a thick comforter, smooth bedding, and a subtle headboard, all in a solid color and minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bed, the draped comforter, and the slightly raised headboard area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick mattress and comforter, with bedding extending close to the floor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous bedding and the absence of a footboard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same thick bedding and mattress profile as the other side.
